description: Configure the Weight & Balance tool for a Cessna 172SP with an Empty Weight of 1600 lbs and a Max Gross Weight of 2550 lbs. Define the following stations and arms: 'Front Seat' (37 inches), 'Rear Seat' (73 inches), 'Fuel' (48 inches), and 'Baggage' (95 inches). For the current flight, enter loads of 350 lbs for the Front Seat, 150 lbs for the Rear Seat, 180 lbs (30 gallons) for Fuel, and 50 lbs for Baggage. Ensure the total weight and Center of Gravity (CG) are calculated and displayed.
